eas_text: A civil authority has issued A SHELTER IN PLACE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Emmet, IA; at 06:20 PM ON MAR 15, 2026 Effective until 04:20 AM MAR 16, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: ALL PLOWS HAVE BEEN PULLED FROM EMMET COUNTY. ROADS ARE DRIFTING SHUT. NO TRAVEL AT THIS TIME, OTHERWISE YOU WILL LIKELY SHELTER IN PLACE.
